hero.sub: Your personal productivity system — tasks, progress and rewards built for those who take it seriously.

features.title: Built for your flow
features.sub: Tools that adapt to the way you work, not the other way around.

card0.title: Task management
card0.desc: Priorities, categories, bulk entry and drag to reorder. Your workflow, your way.

card1.title: Badge system
card1.desc: Real achievements unlocked by consistency and volume. Progress you can see.

card2.title: Themes & customization
card2.desc: Interface adapted to your visual identity. Colors, logo and style that match you.

card3.title: Statistics
card3.desc: Understand your patterns and track your evolution. Data that reveals your real habits.

card4.title: Voice control
card4.desc: Add tasks by speaking, without taking your eyes off what matters. Hands-free productivity.

card5.title: Deadlines & Priorities
card5.desc: Organize by urgency, set deadlines and see what needs your attention right now.

step0.title: Build your routine
step0.desc: Organize your tasks by priority and category. Adapt the system to your workflow — not the other way around.

step1.title: Build consistency
step1.desc: Your progress is tracked day by day. Streaks, completion patterns and regularity you can actually feel.

step2.title: Reap the rewards
step2.desc: Badges and achievements that reflect what you actually accomplished. Motivation based on concrete results.

preview.title: Inside the app
preview.sub: A clean interface that gets out of the way and lets you focus.

cta.title: Ready for your
cta.sub: Set up in minutes. See the difference on the first day.

footer.made: Made with love to help you be more productive.

notice.loginPrefix: By signing in you agree to our
notice.signupPrefix: By creating an account you agree to our

input.batchPlaceholder: Type multiple tasks, one per line. E.g.: kitchen: make dinner. Press "Add lines".

actions.searchPlaceholder: Search by task, category or note…

empty.noPendingSub: You've completed every task. Perfect orbit.
empty.noDoneSub: Complete tasks and they'll show up here.
empty.noTasksSub: Add your first task and set your plans in motion.

hero.sub: Task manager with visual intelligence, achievements and total customization.

step1.label: Drag & Drop
step1.title: Drag and Organize
step1.desc: Click, hold and drag any task to reposition it. The order is yours.

step2.label: Priorities
step2.title: Urgency in Colors
step2.desc: Classify what matters. High, Medium, Low or Neutral — visually distinct.
step2.tip: Set when creating or editing a task

step3.label: Statistics
step3.title: Track your Rhythm
step3.desc: Completion rate, consecutive day streaks and detailed history.
step3.tip: Access via Statistics in the sidebar

step4.label: Features
step4.title: Everything in its Place
step4.desc: Deadlines, notes, categories, search, filters, themes and unlockable achievements.

guide.createTaskDesc: Type in the field and press Enter or click the add button
guide.completeTaskDesc: Click the circle to the left of the task to mark it as completed
guide.editTaskDesc: Double-click the text to enter edit mode
guide.prioritiesDesc: Set urgency levels: High, Medium, Low or Neutral
guide.bulkInputDesc: Paste multiple tasks at once, separated by line
guide.reorderDesc: Drag tasks by the side icon to reorganize
guide.themesDesc: 6 themes available with unique color schemes
guide.customLogoDesc: Unlock to customize the image and color of the logo
guide.achievementsDesc: Unlock badges by completing special challenges
guide.statisticsDesc: Track your progress with detailed metrics
guide.dailyGoalDesc: Set how many tasks you want to complete per day
guide.saveNote: Your tasks are automatically saved in the browser. Data persists even after closing the page.

batchGuide.title: Mini guide (Bulk)
batchGuide.sub: Click copy to paste wherever you want.
batchGuide.oneLineDesc: Each Enter creates a task. The app understands headers and categories.
batchGuide.tagCatDesc: Write the task and end with #category (or @category).
batchGuide.parenLocDesc: Use "(location)" at the end of the task.
batchGuide.groupHeaderDesc: Sets the "active" category for the next lines.

clearDone.title: Clear completed
clearDone.body: Are you sure you want to remove all completed tasks? This action cannot be undone.

removeAll.title: Remove all
removeAll.body: Are you sure you want to remove all tasks? This action cannot be undone.

settings.title: Settings
settings.sub: Customize your experience the way you prefer

display.searchDesc: Shows the search bar to find tasks by text, category or note.
display.sortDesc: Enable/disable sorting options (Manual, Priority, Deadline, etc.).
display.indicatorsDesc: Shows counters and useful indicators at the top of the list (pending/completed).
display.progressBarDesc: Shows a bar with the overall progress of completed tasks.

behavior.confettiDesc: Visual explosion when completing a task
behavior.quickActionsDesc: Shows quick action buttons on tasks (edit, complete, remove).
behavior.dragDesc: Allows reordering tasks by drag and drop (Manual mode).
behavior.streakDesc: Shows how many consecutive days you completed at least one task.
behavior.soundsDesc: Enables short sounds when adding, completing or removing tasks.

accessibility.voiceDesc: Speak to add and complete tasks

settings.footer: 💜 Made with love to help you be more productive
